comments.body:
LGTM
but I'm surprised opencontainers/selinux isn't in go.mod, it is set appropriately in go.sum.  I need to learn more about go mod funkiness.

`go.mod` only contains:
- Direct dependencies
- Indirect dependencies of non-module packages
- Indirect dependencies of module packages that have been upgraded to a later version than the dependency requires

`opencontainers/selinux` is none of the above; it is an indirect dependency of modules c/image and c/storage.
